000.reason: Pupils are raised, muzzle/nose bridge tip upward, chin lifts; frontal cardinal is unmistakable.

022.5.reason: Horizontal: pupils and nose/muzzle shift screen-right. Vertical: raised pupils and lifted chin/eyelids show up; slight right-ear follow-through.

045.reason: Horizontal: clear screen-right head yaw with nose projecting right. Vertical: pupils/eyelids and lifted muzzle indicate up.

067.5.reason: Horizontal: strong rightward nose/muzzle and head yaw. Vertical: gaze remains elevated with upward eyelid/pupil placement.

090.reason: Unmistakable right-profile cardinal: nose, muzzle, pupils, head yaw, and ear placement all point screen-right.

112.5.reason: Horizontal: nose/muzzle and pupils remain screen-right of center. Vertical: lowered pupils, chin, and upper eyelids indicate down; ears follow the yaw.

135.reason: Vertical: clearly lowered pupils, muzzle, and chin. Horizontal: nose/pupils have only a subtle rightward displacement and head yaw is near frontal, matching the blind horizontal ambiguity.

157.5.reason: Vertical: strong down-facing pupils, eyelids, and lowered muzzle. Horizontal: slight screen-right pupil/nose bias but near-frontal head yaw, matching the blind ambiguity.

180.reason: Unmistakable frontal-down cardinal: pupils, muzzle, and chin all point toward the bottom edge.

202.5.reason: Horizontal: pupils, nose/muzzle, and head yaw shift screen-left. Vertical: lowered gaze, eyelids, and chin show down.

225.reason: Horizontal: distinct screen-left muzzle projection and yaw. Vertical: lowered pupils/eyelids and chin establish down.

247.5.reason: Horizontal: strong leftward nose/muzzle and head yaw. Vertical: low pupil/eyelid placement remains clearly down.

270.reason: Unmistakable left-profile cardinal: pupils, nose/muzzle, head yaw, and ear follow-through point screen-left.

292.5.reason: Horizontal: screen-left nose/muzzle projection and yaw. Vertical: raised pupil line, eyelids, and lifted chin indicate up.

315.reason: Horizontal: leftward pupil/nose placement and yaw remain clear. Vertical: elevated gaze and lifted muzzle/chin indicate up.

337.5.reason: Horizontal: pupils and muzzle have a readable screen-left bias. Vertical: only subtle upward pitch/eyelid evidence; blind review classified it down, though the labeled ordered pose remains in the up-left quadrant.

continuity_review: No reversal, conspicuous normal-size snap, identity drift, scale defect, or registration defect observed. The flagged 022.5→045, 112.5→135, and 157.5→180 metric changes read as pose interpolation/angle changes at normal size. The 090 rows 154–156 transparency is visible as natural negative space around separated limbs/tail rather than an anatomy hole.
blind_warning_review: 135 and 157.5 have weak but still right-biased labeled horizontal evidence, so their blind ambiguity is warnings. 337.5 has readable leftward evidence but weak upward evidence; its blind vertical mismatch is a warning. All cardinals are visually unmistakable.
repair_note: No row repair required; retain the three intermediate-direction warnings for release QA.
